entry.title: Geofence Reminders Not Firing
entry.summary: Why arrival geofence reminders never fired and the fixes.

body:
# Geofence Reminders Not Firing

Geofence-based 'remind me when I arrive' reminders never fired on iOS because defineTask was nested instead of top-level, the background location task was never registered at startup, and the expo-location config plugin plus UIBackgroundModes were missing. Register geofences with syncGeofences at app launch.
